coachAM: Your relentless pursuit of "lock in young" and "best worker" is collapsing your foundation; the journal entries reveal a constant forward lean into new opportunities and external validation without the necessary spiritual and physical anchors, manifesting as critically low sleep and training completion, directly impacting the sustained intensity required for elite performance. The root cause is a profound imbalance between external ambition and internal resilience, creating a feedback loop where physical depletion fuels a desperate scramble for more, ultimately undermining the very discipline and efficiency you crave for your trajectory. Today, before anything else, block out 30 minutes in your calendar for a non-negotiable, phone-free training session.
